title: Surfer Kids aim for Cape Town champs
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Seventeen surfers of The Surfer Kids Club and NPO in Mossel Bay will be participating in trials for the upcoming Grommet Games, a competitive surfing championship taking place in Muizenberg, Cape Town, this March.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Seventeen surfers of The Surfer Kids Club and NPO in Mossel Bay will be participating in trials for the upcoming Grommet Games, a competitive surfing championship taking place in Muizenberg, Cape Town, this March."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The trials will span over two days, the first in Buffels Bay this Saturday, 17 January, and the second in Mossel Bay on Sunday."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The successful members of The Surfer Kids will join the team known as the Eden Surf Riders and compete in Muizenberg in age groups of U8 to U16.","html":"The successful members of The Surfer Kids will join the team known as the Eden Surf Riders and compete in Muizenberg in age groups of U8 to U16."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Eden Surf Riders currently consists of 24 surfers who were the champions of the 2025 Grommet Games.","html":"The Eden Surf Riders currently consists of 24 surfers who were the champions of the 2025 Grommet Games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Surfer Kids' manager, Chuma Magusha, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the surfers have been extensively preparing for the upcoming trials with the help of one-on-one coaching and Grommet Games simulations.","html":"The Surfer Kids' manager, Chuma Magusha, told Mossel Bay Advertiser the surfers have been extensively preparing for the upcoming trials with the help of one-on-one coaching and Grommet Games simulations."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Surfer Kids is a non-profit organisation in Mossel Bay that aims to empower the youth through surfing.","html":"The Surfer Kids is a non-profit organisation in Mossel Bay that aims to empower the youth through surfing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Surfer Kids aim for Cape Town champs
